name: kit
description: Community plugin & skills marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: vitest
plugins.description: Auto-invoked skill for writing, debugging, and configuring Vitest tests in Vite-based projects

plugins.name: skill-review
plugins.description: Slash-command skill that reviews any SKILL.md against best practices and outputs a structured pass/fail report

plugins.name: gh-cli
plugins.description: Auto-invoked skill for working with GitHub from the command line using the gh CLI tool

plugins.name: personal-tutor
plugins.description: Adaptive technical tutoring skill that builds a persistent knowledge graph and learner profile across sessions

plugins.name: deepwiki-cli
plugins.description: Query GitHub repository wikis via DeepWiki CLI without MCP token overhead.
